SHORT CAUSE TRIAL
Off Calendar Jul-21-2010 Judgment Entered
MINI MINUTES: Judge Jeffrey Ross, Clerk Karissa Shaw, Not Reported. (611)

APPEARANCES:
Plaintiffs/Respondents Jennifer and Ryan Jennings are present.
Defendants/Appellants Jagir Multani and Jitu Somaya.

This matter comes on calendar for a trial de novo. The court, court personnel and litigants are present in open court. The court takes testimony and exbihits from both sides.

Appellants' Exhibits A, B, and C are marked. Respondent Somaya's Exhibits 1 and 2 are marked.

MATTER TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION.

7/21/10 - Judgment entered.
